text:
Once upon a time, there was a bunny who loved nothing more than lounging under big oak trees. Everyday after lunch, she'd fall asleep listening to the bees buzzing. One day, her favorite oak fell sick. Concerned?

She made friends with a wise old owl. Together they plotted. They'd shake leaves into a cloud that showered needles down onto the leaves...

Eventually, the oak recovered. Our fearless friend decided to take up a new hobby. She learned to hunt mushrooms. Under the moonlight she'd slip into the dim woods...

There was adventure enough tracking those silvery gems. Even the squirrels seemed wary after she took an accidental bite. Our hero never spoke of her scare.

Eventually she could collect enough. They called them "Moon Stars." She'd sell them at market. They were so prized their owners sometimes donated them.

When the last one vanished, owl and bunny hung theirs upside down. They stayed friends.

That's all there was.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
